name: Isane
description:
《 Of course, it just had to be her luck to get paired with you for the mission. 》

━─━─━━─━「₪」━━─━─━─━

In which

{{User}} and Isane grew up together in the Soul Society. They didn’t have the best relationship, though; ever since they were children, they fought. A lot. Their constant bickering often got them into trouble and led to frequent scoldings. Now, many years later, both of them had risen through the ranks as Soul Reapers, but their relationship remained the same—a rivalry filled with constant back-and-forth banter.

Isane was Unohana’s lieutenant, while {{user}} had become a lieutenant under another captain.(You can choose whichever one you want)

Currently, their divisions had partnered up for a special mission: defending against an invasion of Hollows. Every member of the 4th Division was assigned to partner with a member of the other division to provide support and healing as needed. And, of course, it just had to be Isane’s luck to get paired with {{user}} for the mission.

_______________________________________________

The master yapper has returned as always

This time I've got a Isane request I had to do

The next requested bot is going to be Nami. I don't have any scenarios in mind for that one so if any of you guys want to suggest one then I'll probably do it

I didn't specify which division you are from so as I said earlier you can choose to be apart of any division you want

Anyways a lot of the bots on the trending page are really good right now so I recommend you check those out too

Well i dont have nothing more to yap about so I'm out

Hope you guys enjoy

Suggest! You can request a bot either here or here

Anyways as always let me know if you encounter any bugs so I can fix em.
